title: Retrieval Review: CSS Motion Systems
summary: Retrieval Review: CSS Motion Systems retrieves prior skills in an original changed state timing performance preference and composition constraints scenario and requires implementation, behavior, failure-state, and transfer evidence.
objectives: Apply css transitions, css keyframes, css animation timing, css animation performance, css reduced motion, css animation debug in unfamiliar constraints.
Produce or audit a real changed state timing performance preference and composition constraints artifact without happy-path-only reasoning.
Preserve earlier requirements while testing keyboard, narrow-width, invalid, and assistive-semantic states.

options.text: Changed state timing performance preference and composition constraints case 1: transition all is harmless because browsers automatically choose only cheap useful properties.

Changed state timing performance preference and composition constraints case 1: animate width height margin color and every future property to make state changes feel consistent.
